contentComparison.reason: Revision 3 fixes applied — full visual comparison performed

output.compositionNotes: Overall card proportions match Figma. Two-panel layout with substantial 4:3 image rectangle on the left and dark content panel on the right. Button has clear visual separation from excerpt. Date badge positioned correctly in top-right of image area.

revisionFixVerification.description: Image keeps aspect-[4/3] on all breakpoints (was incorrectly switching to aspect-auto on desktop)
revisionFixVerification.evidence: At 1440px desktop, the image panel renders as a substantial 4:3 rectangle matching the Figma card proportions. The image is no longer too short. The aspect ratio is visually consistent at 375px, 768px, 1024px, and 1440px across all browsers. Code confirms: aspect-[4/3] on line 37 with no responsive override.

revisionFixVerification.description: Content half has mb-6 spacing between text group and CTA button (was justify-between with no extra space)
revisionFixVerification.evidence: The CTA button 'VIEW EVENT' has clear visible separation from the excerpt text above it at all breakpoints. The gap is approximately 24px (mb-6), providing comfortable visual breathing room. The button is no longer jammed against the text. Code confirms: mb-6 on the text group wrapper at line 59.

observations: Two-panel horizontal card layout with image left, content right — matches Figma
Image panel is a substantial 4:3 rectangle, proportional to Figma's image area
Dark background (#1f1f1d) on both card halves with rounded-3xl corners — matches Figma
Date badge visible in top-right of image with day/number/month format — matches Figma
Event title in large Anton heading — matches Figma typography
Location and excerpt text in smaller sans-serif below title — matches Figma
VIEW EVENT button with arrow icon at bottom of content panel with clear spacing from text above
Section header with eyebrow, heading, and description in two-column layout — matches Figma
Horizontal two-panel layout maintained at laptop width
Image maintains 4:3 aspect ratio — not squished or too short
Button spacing from text remains consistent
All card elements visible and properly laid out
Horizontal layout activates at md breakpoint — image and content side by side
Image 4:3 aspect ratio maintained
Content text wraps appropriately at narrower width
Button has clear separation from excerpt
Cards stack vertically — image on top, content below
Image maintains 4:3 aspect ratio in stacked layout
Content panel has proper padding and readable text
Button visible with clear spacing from text above
Date badge positioned correctly on image

crossBrowserResults.firefox: PASS — visually identical to Chromium at all breakpoints
crossBrowserResults.webkit: PASS — visually identical to Chromium at all breakpoints
